symptoms.symptom_name: Continuous generalised convulsion >5 minutes with no recovery of consciousness

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The >5-minute unremitting convulsion without recovery IS the operational definition of convulsive status epilepticus.
Usual seizures self-terminate within 1-2 minutes; persistence beyond 5 minutes excludes an ordinary self-limiting event.

symptoms.symptom_name: Peri-oral cyanosis with noisy/obstructed breathing during the seizure

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hypoxia from sustained chest-wall contraction, secretions and impaired airway protection marks physiological compromise and severity.
Objective cyanosis/hypoxia is not a feature of a psychogenic event.
Extreme sustained muscular exertion produces tachycardia and hyperthermia; clinician-measured, sealed — the AI infers distress from carer observation, not a measured value.
Fever keeps infective provocation on the differential but is non-specific; most likely exertional here.

symptoms.symptom_name: Abrupt cessation of maintenance levetiracetam 3 days ago

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Anti-seizure medication withdrawal is a leading precipitant of breakthrough seizures and status in known epilepsy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Episode markedly longer and different from the patient's usual self-limiting seizures

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A change from a known self-limiting pattern to unremitting activity is the carer-observable signal of status.

symptoms.symptom_name: Complete unresponsiveness with incontinence of urine

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Depth of impaired consciousness and incontinence support a true generalised convulsive event and loss of airway protection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Preserved strong central pulse and spontaneous (if compromised) breathing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A confirmed strong central pulse excludes cardiac arrest; if a carer cannot detect breathing/pulse the pathway switches to CPR.

symptoms.symptom_name: Arterial blood gas (severe lactic acidosis and hypoxia)

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Underestimation of metabolic derangement; hospital-only, never available in telehealth in real time.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Quantifies the metabolic cost of prolonged convulsion; sealed hospital investigation.

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Non-convulsive status could be missed after convulsions cease; hospital/ICU investigation only.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: cEEG confirms ongoing electrical status; a sealed inpatient investigation never available via chat.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bedside capillary blood glucose (by paramedics on arrival)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Hypoglycaemia is a rapidly reversible cause of prolonged seizure; a paramedic/hospital point-of-care test, not an AI/telehealth action.
To detect ongoing non-convulsive status after the visible convulsion is aborted.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Arterial blood gas and serum lactate
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Quantifies hypoxia and lactic acidosis to guide resuscitation.
